channel.title: Speechmatics Articles & News
channel.description: Speech-to-text, voice AI, and product news from Speechmatics

item.title: How to build a microbatching workflow with the Speechmatics API
item.description: Learn how to build a micro-batching workflow with the Speechmatics API, from chunk sizing and retries to JSON stitching and scaling.

item.title: Alphanumeric speech recognition: why voice assistants mangle SKUs (and how to fix it)
item.description: Why voice assistants mishear SKUs, model numbers and codes, and how ASR teams can fix alphanumeric recognition.

item.title: The Adobe story: How we made cloud-grade AI work on your laptop
item.description: How Speechmatics built cloud-grade speech recognition for Adobe Premiere, then took on Whisper to keep raising the bar.

item.title: Adobe and Speechmatics deliver cloud-grade speech recognition on-device for Premiere
item.description: Speechmatics and Adobe bring near-cloud accuracy speech recognition on-device to Premiere — private, offline, and built for professional creators.

item.title: Best speech-to-text AI guide: APIs, platforms and services compared
item.description: Compare the best speech-to-text AI platforms of 2026, including Speechmatics, Deepgram, AssemblyAI and more — find the right API for your use case.

item.title: AI can now understand health signals from 15 seconds of your voice, including fatigue, stress and type 2 diabetes
item.description: Speechmatics and thymia launch voice AI that detects 30-plus health signals from 15 seconds of speech, alongside standard transcription.

item.title: Speed you can trust: The STT metrics that matter for voice agents
item.description: Which speech-to-text latency metrics actually matter for voice agents? A deep dive into TTFS, accuracy, and why Pipecat’s benchmarks change the convo.

item.title: Speechmatics and Cekura bring real-world STT testing to voice agent pipelines
item.description: A new Speechmatics and Cekura integration helps voice agent teams test STT in real production conditions, not just clean-audio demos.

item.title: Speech-to-text in production: what 36 years of hard lessons taught me
item.description: From latency to turn detection, Dr Tony Robinson shares what 36 years in speech-to-text taught him about building Voice AI that works in production.

item.title: What Word Error Rate Is Acceptable for Legal Transcription?
item.description: What word error rate is acceptable for legal transcription? Learn how WER, legal risk, review obligations, and transcript use cases affect accuracy.

item.title: Best TTS APIs in 2026: ElevenLabs, Google, AWS & 9 More Compared
item.description: Independent comparison of 12 TTS APIs including ElevenLabs, Google Cloud, Amazon Polly and Speechmatics. Ranked by latency, pricing and voice quality.

item.title: Blog & Latest Speech Recognition News| Speechmatics
item.description: Stay up-to-date with the very latest product news, company news and artificial intelligence (AI) research. Bookmark our technology blog today!
